title: OptiFied
description: OptiFied is a modpack focused only on optimization and performance. Each version is tested carefully before release.
body:
**OptiFied** is a well-researched modpack focused purely on optimization. Each version is carefully tested before release, ensuring maximum performance, smooth gameplay, and stability—and to minimize the need for bug fixes or updates after launch.

  — — —

**Disclaimer:**
You will see a significantly higher performance increase on low-end systems (estimated around 35–45%), while mid- to high-end systems typically experience a 20–30% boost. These numbers may vary depending on individual circumstances.

  — — —

**Testing PC's**

PC nr.1: i5-12600k|RTX 3060ti 8gb|32gb 6000MHZ DDR5

PC nr.2: i7-4770k|GTX 980ti 6gb|16gb 2300MHZ DDR3

PC nr.3 i7-4770k|RTX 3060ti 8gb|16gb 2300MHZ DDR3

PC nr.4 i5-12600k|GTX 980ti 6gb|32gb 6000MHZ DDR5
